Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono seems to have stepped out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15415 0 0}Let's see, I averaged two hours of overtime... Now factor in the mean age...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Add a little spice here, here, and here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}According to my extrapolations of next year's salary here... I can expect a 4.17% increase.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Huh? Wait a second, if I round up... then I actually get 5.17%![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, in any case, this is one beautiful equation...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15413 0 0}Oh, hello there, {f 4 1}-kun. Did you overhear my calculations?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Isn't my use of pi in that equation a daring move?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sure, it may not have been strictly necessary, but it's a question of elegance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even Masamune himself would be impressed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, uh... Guess Mr. Ono's been rubbing off on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15422 0 0}I assume you're here because you've discovered the beauty of math, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once you master its brilliance, even winning the lottery is a breeze.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just calculate the probability from all sides... And determine the precise collection totals, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then if you calculate how much of your winnings you ought to save, you'll always make a profit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1085 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not that I've ever bought a ticket...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I listened to the secret behind[n]falling in love with math...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono doesn't seem to be returning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to give up for today.[n]{f 1 1}
